title: Introduction to Machine Learning
description: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that provides systems the ability to automatically learn and improve from experience.

title: Deep Learning Fundamentals
description: Deep learning uses neural networks with many layers to model complex patterns in data. Applications include image recognition and natural language processing.

title: Natural Language Processing with Python
description: NLP enables computers to understand, interpret, and generate human language. This course covers tokenization, sentiment analysis, and text classification.

title: Data Structures and Algorithms
description: Essential computer science concepts including arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, sorting algorithms, and search algorithms.

title: Web Development with FastAPI
description: Build modern, fast web APIs using Python and FastAPI framework. Covers routing, authentication, database integration, and deployment.

title: Advanced Search Engine Architecture
description: Learn how search engines work internally. Covers indexing, inverted indices, ranking algorithms like BM25 and TF-IDF, and query optimization.
